metrics.name: flowchain_latest_height
metrics.help: Latest FlowChain block height from ops snapshot.

metrics.name: flowchain_finalized_height
metrics.help: Finalized FlowChain block height from ops snapshot.

metrics.name: flowchain_state_file_age_seconds
metrics.help: Age of the live state file in seconds.

metrics.name: flowchain_monitor_samples_total
metrics.help: Service monitor samples recorded in the current ops snapshot.

metrics.name: flowchain_height_advanced
metrics.help: One when service monitor proved advancing block height.

metrics.name: flowchain_ops_critical_findings
metrics.help: Current critical ops finding count.

metrics.name: flowchain_ops_blocked_findings
metrics.help: Current owner-blocked ops finding count.

metrics.name: flowchain_ops_alert_rules_total
metrics.help: Configured ops alert rule count.

metrics.name: flowchain_ops_alert_rules_critical
metrics.help: Configured critical ops alert rule count.

metrics.name: flowchain_ops_alert_rules_blocked
metrics.help: Configured owner-blocked ops alert rule count.

metrics.name: flowchain_ops_active_alert_rules
metrics.help: Active ops alert rule count for the current findings.

metrics.name: flowchain_service_status_ready
metrics.help: One when service status report is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_service_monitor_ready
metrics.help: One when service monitor report is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_ready
metrics.help: One when public RPC readiness is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_deployment_bundle_ready
metrics.help: One when the public RPC deployment bundle is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_deployment_automation_ready
metrics.help: One when public RPC deployment automation validation is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_disallowed_origin_preflight
metrics.help: One when the public RPC bundle includes a disallowed origin preflight.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_broad_state_blocked_preflight
metrics.help: One when the public RPC bundle blocks broad state paths in preflight.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_private_wallet_create_blocked_preflight
metrics.help: One when the public RPC bundle blocks private wallet creation paths in preflight.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_auth_forwarding_scoped
metrics.help: One when public RPC authorization forwarding is scoped to tester writes.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_rendered_disallowed_origin_probe
metrics.help: One when rendered public RPC preflight has the disallowed origin probe.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_rendered_broad_state_blocked_probe
metrics.help: One when rendered public RPC preflight blocks broad state paths.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_rendered_private_wallet_create_blocked_probe
metrics.help: One when rendered public RPC preflight blocks private wallet creation paths.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_rpc_rendered_auth_forwarding_scoped
metrics.help: One when rendered public RPC authorization forwarding is scoped to tester writes.

metrics.name: flowchain_backup_ready
metrics.help: One when backup readiness is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_backup_retention_count
metrics.help: Configured state backup retention count from backup readiness.

metrics.name: flowchain_backup_retention_candidates
metrics.help: Number of eligible state backup snapshots seen by retention.

metrics.name: flowchain_backup_retention_snapshot_protected
metrics.help: One when retention protected the latest state backup snapshot.

metrics.name: flowchain_backup_retention_prune_errors
metrics.help: State backup retention prune error count.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_live_ready
metrics.help: One when bridge live readiness is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_infra_ready
metrics.help: One when bridge infrastructure readiness is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_relayer_guardrail_ready
metrics.help: One when bridge relayer fail-closed guardrail is ready.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_direct_observe_guardrail_ready
metrics.help: One when standalone Base observer cursor guardrail is ready.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_direct_observe_staged_cursor_default
metrics.help: One when standalone Base observer defaults to staged cursor state.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_direct_observe_cursor_not_final
metrics.help: One when standalone Base observer cursor state is not the final relayer cursor.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_direct_observe_final_cursor_unchanged
metrics.help: One when standalone Base observer leaves final relayer cursor unchanged.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_direct_observe_staged_cursor_not_written
metrics.help: One when missing-input standalone Base observer leaves staged cursor state unwritten.

metrics.name: flowchain_bridge_relayer_loop_healthy
metrics.help: One when a running bridge relayer loop has fresh healthy no-secret/no-broadcast evidence.

metrics.name: flowchain_supervisor_bridge_relayer_requested
metrics.help: One when the latest service supervisor report requested bridge relayer loop supervision.

metrics.name: flowchain_supervisor_bridge_relayer_recovery_healthy
metrics.help: One when supervisor relayer-loop recovery evidence is healthy, or relayer supervision was not requested.

metrics.name: flowchain_external_tester_ready
metrics.help: One when external tester readiness is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_external_tester_evidence_ready
metrics.help: One when external tester returned evidence validation is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_external_tester_evidence_failed_checks
metrics.help: Failed checks in the external tester returned evidence validation report.

metrics.name: flowchain_external_tester_evidence_missing_files
metrics.help: Missing required files in the external tester returned evidence folder.

metrics.name: flowchain_external_tester_evidence_secret_findings
metrics.help: Secret marker findings in external tester returned evidence.

metrics.name: flowchain_external_tester_evidence_height_advanced
metrics.help: One when returned tester evidence shows block height advanced.

metrics.name: flowchain_external_tester_evidence_transfer_consistent
metrics.help: One when returned tester evidence has matching transfer, transaction, amount, and balance deltas.

metrics.name: flowchain_public_deployment_ready
metrics.help: One when public deployment contract is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_live_cutover_ready
metrics.help: One when the live cutover rehearsal is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_live_cutover_owner_blocked
metrics.help: One when live cutover is blocked only on known owner inputs.

metrics.name: flowchain_live_cutover_missing_owner_inputs
metrics.help: Number of required owner input names still blocking live cutover.

metrics.name: flowchain_no_secret_ready
metrics.help: One when no-secret scan is passed.

metrics.name: flowchain_truth_gates_total
metrics.help: Total production truth table gates.

metrics.name: flowchain_truth_gates_passed
metrics.help: Passed production truth table gates.

metrics.name: flowchain_truth_gates_owner_blocked
metrics.help: Owner-input blocked production truth table gates.

metrics.name: flowchain_truth_gates_repo_blocked
metrics.help: Repo-blocked production truth table gates.

metrics.name: flowchain_truth_gates_failed
metrics.help: Failed production truth table gates.

metrics.name: flowchain_truth_gates_stale
metrics.help: Stale production truth table gates.
